_comment: CANONICAL London place gazetteer — single source of truth for both the dashboard map labels (DeckScene.tsx fetches /geo/landmarks.json, rendering entries with label:true) and the Nemotron agent's knowledge graph (agent/nemoray_modelling/places.py reads this file from disk; ALL entries are resolvable/queryable regardless of label). Named emergency-service buildings are NOT listed here — they come from data/emergency|nemoray/data/*.csv via emergency.py and are merged into the graph at runtime, so this file never duplicates them. WGS84 lat/lng. 'tier' (0 major hub · 1 area/landmark · 2 finer POI) drives the HUD label declutter and only matters when label:true. 'category' ∈ area|landmark|attraction|transport|stadium|park|museum|government. 'aliases' are extra names the operator/agent might say. The first 34 entries (label:true) preserve the exact coords/tier of the previously-hardcoded DeckScene labels; flip label:true on any other entry to surface it on the map. Hand-authored; deterministic, offline, demo-safe.
